title: Earnings Preview: Enovix Corporation (ENVX) Q2 Earnings Expected to Decline
text: Enovix Corporation is anticipated to report significant declines in its second quarter 2023 results. The company is expected to post a quarterly loss of $0.24 per share, representing an 84.6% year-over-year decline. Revenue projections are equally concerning, with expectations of $0.27 million, down 94.7% from the prior-year quarter. The earnings report was scheduled for release on July 26, 2023. Enovix received a modest positive signal with a Zacks Earnings ESP of +2.13%, indicating analysts recently became more optimistic. However, the stock carries a Zacks Rank of #4, making it difficult to predict whether the company will beat consensus estimates.
